OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Attorney Tony Ruch appearing for the plaintiff. Represented by Ranita Mason
Defendant Monica Hernandez is present.
Attorney Richard Smoke representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem David Yang, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

This case settled, the trial date of NOV-7-2011 is vacated.
